PLAINTIFF'S 137 PAGE "TRIAL BRIEF" WAS FILED WITH THE CLERK'S OFFICE YESTERDAY, FEBRUARY 14TH, AND THE COURT DID NOT RECEIVE A COURTESY COPY.
